Package neqsim.process.safety.esd

Class EmergencyShutdownTestRunner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.esd.EmergencyShutdownTestRunner
public final class EmergencyShutdownTestRunner extends Object
Runs emergency shutdown dynamic tests and builds structured evidence reports.

The runner reuses existing NeqSim process equipment, ProcessLogic sequences, ProcessSystem.runTransient(double, UUID), and operational tag maps. It does not emulate a certified SIS logic solver; instead, it verifies the process response when documented ESD actions are represented by NeqSim logic and equipment models.

Version:
1.0
Author:
NeqSim contributors

  • Method Details

    • run

      public static EmergencyShutdownTestResult run(ProcessSystem process, EmergencyShutdownTestPlan plan, ProcessLogic... logicSequences)
      Runs an ESD dynamic test with one or more process logic sequences.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to test
      plan - ESD test plan
      logicSequences - process logic sequences available to the test
      Returns:
      ESD test report

    • run

      public static EmergencyShutdownTestResult run(ProcessSystem process, EmergencyShutdownTestPlan plan, List<ProcessLogic> logicSequences)
      Runs an ESD dynamic test with a list of process logic sequences.
      Parameters:
      process - process system to test
      plan - ESD test plan
      logicSequences - process logic sequences available to the test
      Returns:
      ESD test report

    • runTransientLoop

      private static void runTransientLoop(ProcessSystem process, EmergencyShutdownTestPlan plan, List<ProcessLogic> enabledLogic, List<ProcessLogic> triggerLogic, EmergencyShutdownTestResult result)
      Runs the transient loop and captures monitored samples.
      Parameters:
      process - process system
      plan - test plan
      enabledLogic - logic sequences executed each step
      triggerLogic - logic sequences activated at trigger time
      result - result receiving samples, warnings, and errors

      Parameters:
      availableLogic - available logic sequences
      names - requested logic names
      result - result receiving warnings
      Returns:
      selected logic list

      Parameters:

      tagMap - operational tag map
      tag - logical tag or automation address
      units - units keyed by tag
      result - result receiving warnings
      Returns:
      monitored value, or null when unavailable
